page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8ae.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at 3.4 GHz. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates strong single-core and memory capabilities. Its stress-ng single-core CPU performance ranks in the top tier, complemented by top-tier text processing speeds in Geekbench. Multi-threaded performance is also robust, with Geekbench multi-core scores and bzip3 multi-threaded decompression ranking in the top 25%. Passmark memory scores and CPU encryption tests also place in the top 25%, while multi-core stress-ng, database operations, and Redis SET operations perform at an average level.

The lack of bundled local storage means all storage operations must traverse the network, which may impact I/O-heavy workloads despite the 20 Gbps baseline bandwidth. However, the dedicated AMD EPYC cores and large memory capacity offer high resource density and cost efficiency for memory-bound applications. This hardware profile is highly suited for memory-intensive workloads, including medium-sized databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise applications, and data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8ae.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at 3.4 GHz. Equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, it delivers a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, utilizing a 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for external connectivity. Performance benchmarks highlight top-tier single-core CPU and text processing capabilities, alongside strong multi-core and memory bandwidth results. While the absence of local storage requires network-attached storage, the dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density provide excellent qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive workloads. It is well-suited for database hosting, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8ae.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 256 GB RAM, and 20 Gbps network bandwidth, ideal for databases and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8ae.8xlarge features 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores and 256 GB RAM, delivering top-tier single-core performance for memory-heavy workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high memory density for demanding database and enterprise workloads.

Equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB per core
